title: Support - Tenant info persists after updating the app
scenario: Tenant information persists in Poly Lens Menu > Support > App after updating the mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. Register a mobile user on a tenant.
3. Navigate to Home → Menu (hamburger icon) → Support → App.
4. Verify that the tenant information is displayed correctly.
5. Install a new version of the Poly Studio Mobile app (e.g., via app store update or sideload).
6. Launch the updated Poly Studio Mobile app.
7. Navigate to Home → Menu (hamburger icon) → Support → App.
expected: After updating the app, the tenant information should be cleared or reset, as tenant info should not persist across app updates.
